# Security Checklist: Precompute Grid-Level Features

**Purpose**: Validate safe handling of failures and retries.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/030-precompute-grid-features/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Write failures retry and roll back on repeated failure.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Missing source datasets produce warnings, not corrupted data.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Job warnings and failures are logged.
